subcodes.first_line: O my God! This is Thy maidservant who hath been set ablaze with the fire of Thy love, hath been attracted by the sweet fragrances of Thy holiness, and hath turned her face [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی هذه امتک التی اشتعلت بنار محبتک و انجذبت بنفحات قدسک و توجهت
subcodes.subjects: @presence of; reunion with God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for women, @love of God
